description: Upstream repositories cloned by install.sh into ~/.claude/skills/. After each clone, our wrapper SKILL.md from skills/<name>/SKILL.md is copied in at the top level so Claude Code can discover it.

repos.name: skillui
repos.author: amaancoderx
repos.purpose: CLI that reverse-engineers any website into a Claude-ready design-system bundle.

repos.name: webgpu
repos.author: dgreenheck
repos.purpose: Three.js WebGPU + TSL reference for shader-based visuals.

repos.name: awesome-design-md
repos.author: VoltAgent
repos.purpose: 68+ ready-to-use DESIGN.md files captured from real brands.

repos.name: ui-ux-pro-max
repos.author: nextlevelbuilder
repos.purpose: Design intelligence: 161 product types, 50+ styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings.

repos.name: taste-skill
repos.author: Leonxlnx
repos.purpose: High-agency frontend skill encoding anti-slop design philosophy.
